item.title: Mysterious Ancient Tunnel Found Beneath Jerusalem Baffles Archaeologists - Ancient Origins
item.description: Mysterious Ancient Tunnel Found Beneath Jerusalem Baffles Archaeologists  Ancient OriginsAncient tunnel discovery near Jerusalem baffles archaeologists  MSNMysterious underground tunnel found beneath Jerusalem leaves archaeologists stunned  GB NewsArcheologists uncover ancient Jerusalem tunnel with mysterious purpose  AOL.comArchaeologists discover a hidden massive underground tunnel in Jerusalem, and no one knows who dug it  MSN
